per_clue.blog: {s}TATION next to L in FIR This is the clue that took me 11 minutes. And I had the parsing right all along: I knew it had something to do with hitting on someone, but I was parsing it as “[unopened post by large] tree houses”, and I was looking for synonyms of ‘post’ like MAIL or SEND, as well as trees that end in -ION. Finally the word STATION came to mind and I was able to put the answer together.
